channel.title: 虚拟机 on Margrop Blog
channel.description: Recent content in 虚拟机 on Margrop Blog

item.title: How to Install Jike AC Virtual Machine in Proxmox VE Environment?
item.description:
According to 恩山的集客AC AP扫盲贴:

Q: Can I skip AC and have two AP connect directly to the main router for roaming? A: Yes, but roaming works better with AC than without it. With ac present, roaming performance won’t disappoint. Jike’s roaming is not a simple weak-signal kick. With ac in place, excellent roaming effects are achieved regardless of whether Jike ap supports kvr, because ac+ap is proactive roaming, which does not rely on kvr protocol and has very low requirements on clients. Micro ac only handles configuration distribution and cannot perform proactive roaming; roaming effectiveness depends on the client.

item.title: How to Import a Third-Party VM Image into Proxmox VE
item.description:
In the example below, the VM ID is always 100; change it as needed.

File Format Conversion

  • Use qemu-img to convert virtual disk files in other formats to qcow2
  • For example, the following converts vmdk to qcow2

item.title: How to Configure a Freshly Installed Ubuntu 20.04 Server VM on PVE
item.description:
Download the Installation ISO

Aliyun Ubuntu 20.04 live server download Aliyun Ubuntu 18.04 live server download
